texto: What you have now then is the marketing of racialized identities as tools for consumption. And certain racialized bodies and images are associated with hipness, coolness, edginess. So all kinds of youth all over the world are appropriating that style as a way of, sort of, countering authority, stating their rebelliousness, and wanting to be seen as significant.
explicacao: Citação de Amalia Mesa-Bains sobre temas ligados a negocios. “What you have now then is the marketing of racialized identities as tools for consumption. And ce…” articula negocios, appropriation, identity em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como identity e objectification.
